data.intent: Bring gavel oneshot to full feature completeness: deterministic judges (classifier + regression), TOML judge configs, scaffolding templates, config snapshots, expanded validator, step tracking, score averaging fix, deterministic report section, in-situ scaffold fix
Implement DeterministicMetric base class, ClassifierMetric, RegressionMetric; register in JudgeRegistry; add JudgeRunnerStep routing; add scikit-learn dep; unit tests
Extend snapshot_run_config to copy prompts; add step tracking (.workflow_status); expand ValidatorStep checks; add get_judge_config to LocalFileSystemEvalContext
Report deterministic judge section, score averaging exclusion, TOML config_ref resolution, classification/regression scaffold templates, in-situ fix
